findings.summary: 7 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #feedback-name (contrast 4.59), #feedback-name (contrast 2.45), #feedback-email (contrast 4.77), #feedback-email (contrast 2.45), #feedback-message (contrast 4.36)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.
